name: Spiced Peach Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Grease bottoms of 12 muffin cups or line pans with paper muffin cups.
3. In a medium bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and mace.
4. In a small bowl, mix egg, peach yogurt, milk, and oil. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture using a spoon.
5. Pour the egg mixture and chopped dried peaches into the well. Stir until the flour mixture is moistened; the batter should still maintain some lumps in it.
6. Gently spoon the batter into greased muffin pan cups, filling each 2/3 full.
7. Mix all ingredients for the crunch topping except for the butter; cut in butter or margarine until crumbly.
8. Sprinkle each muffin with approximately 1 teaspoon of the topping.
9. Bake for 20-23 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Remove muffins from the pan and serve warm.
